terms.meaning: Welcome / Joyful. A warm greeting used to welcome visitors.
Thank you very much. Expressing deep gratitude.
Home of the Future / School. Literally "a place of learning/fencing."
Companion / About. Representing our shared journey.
Knowledge / Academics. The pursuit of learning.
Community / Village. Our digital and physical gathering place.
Enrollment / To Enter. The beginning of the student journey.
History / Story. Honoring our past narratives.
Respect. A core value in Blaan culture and our school community.
Perseverance / Endurance. The spirit of our learners in pursuing their dreams.
The indigenous people of the region. Our school is proud to be on Blaan ancestral land.
To help each other / Cooperation. Reflecting the spirit of community (Bayanihan).

search_config.placeholder: Try Flehew, Kmasut, welcome, or enrollment
